title: hedeoma patens
intro: Hedeoma patens, also known as spreading pennyroyal, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its essential oils containing menthone and pulegone, exhibiting antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Hedeoma patens include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide pain relief. Herbal preparations of Hedeoma patens can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
